sections.label: Pallavi
sections.ta:
தியாகத்தின் திருவுருவே நிற்குண ராமா
பாச அலைகளின் சுழலினின்றெனை மீட்டருள் பரந்தாமா
sections.translit:
thyAgatthin thiruvuruvE niRguNa rAmA
pAsa alaigaLin suzhalinindRenai mIttaruL parandhAmA
sections.en: Oh, immaculate Lord, the embodiment of ultimate sacrifice, please retrieve me from the tides of attachment in this world.

sections.label: Anupallavi
sections.ta:
தந்தையின் சொல் கேட்டே மகுடம் துறந்தாய்
காவியுடுத்தே காரிகை கரம் பிடித்தே கானகம் சென்றாய்
கொடிய விலங்கும் படியா அரக்கரும் மடிந்திடவே
அடியார்க்கருள் தந்தே வனத்திடை வள்ளலென திகழ்ந்தாய்
sections.translit:
thandhaiyin sol kEttE makudam thuRandhAy
kAviyudutthE kArigai karam piditthE kAnagam sendRAy
kodiya vilangum padiyA arakkarum madindhidavE
adiyArkkaruL thandhE vanatthidai vaLLalena thigazhndhAy
sections.en: You gave up your legitimate right to the crown because your father willed it. Wearing traditional saffron robes and holding your wife’s hand, you departed to the forest. You became a limitless donor of compassion in the jungle, taking care of wild beasts, ruthless demons, and offering mercy to all devotees.

sections.label: Charanam
sections.ta:
புசித்திட உணவு வேண்டி முனியொருவன் யாசிக்க
நேரம் முடிந்ததென உணர்ந்தே நாடகமும் புரிந்தே
நிழலென தொடர்ந்த இளையவனை அர்ப்பணித்தாய்
வந்த வேலை இந்த வேளையோடென்று வைகுண்டம் சென்றாய்
உன்னவதாரமான ராதாகிருஷ்ணனும் பந்தம் களையும் வகையினை
கீதையாய் அருளிட முன்வழி காட்டினாய்
sections.translit:
pusitthida uNavu vENdi muniyoruvan yAsikka
nEram mudindhadhena uNarndhE nAdagamum purindhE
nizhalena thodarndha iLaiyavanai arppaNitthAy
vandha vElai indha vELaiyOdendRu vaikuntam sendRAy
unnavadhAramAna rAdhAkrishNanum bandham kaLaiyum vagaiyinai
gIthaiyAy aruLida munvazhi kAttinAy
sections.en: You made an unthinkable sacrifice, offering the life of your younger brother who followed you like a shadow when the saint (Durvasa) came in, asking for food to eat. You knew that the job for which you came on earth was then complete and departed for the heavenly abode. You first walked the path for your descendant, Radhakrishnan, to follow, as he delivered the gospel of the Gita as an act of compassion to humanity. In doing so, you paved the way for humanity to be rid of worldly attachments. Author’s Note The charanam of this song has the story of Rama ending his life on earth. Lord Rama realizes when Yama comes to talk to him in private and Sage Durvasa forces Lakshmana (who was guarding the private meeting) to open the door and interrupts brother’s secret conversation with Yama that his time on earth is up. Reference is made here to the anecdote from Ramayana after the destruction of Lanka and Rama’s coronation. Durvasa rishi walks in when Rama is chatting with the God of death, Yama, and Lakshmana is keeping the gate so that none enters the chamber per request from God of death. Durvasa after initial hospitality by Lakshmana demands an audition with Rama right away. Otherwise, he was going to curse the whole country. Lakshmana knew the outcome but decides to sacrifice his life but save the country and opens the chamber door. Lakshmana leaves the earth Refer to Uttarakhand of Ramayana. See:
